calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-24-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Steven Finley, Esq. for Appellant / Defendant Michael Castellino, who is also present, with witnesses Mark Wilson and Michael Fitzpatrick

Respondent / Plaintiff Michail Kushinsky, with witnesses Leonid Kriventsov and Bella Kushinsky

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witness are sworn.

Steven Finley, Esq. testifies on behalf of Michael Castelllino, Appellant / Defendant.

Bella Kushinsky testifies on behalf of Respondent / Plaintiff, Michail Kushinsky
Michail Kushinsky testifies on his own behalf.

Michael Fitzpatrick testifies on behalf of Appellant / Defendant Michael Castellino.
Mark Wilson testifies on behalf of Appellant / Defendant Michael Castellino.
Michael Castellino testifies on his own behalf.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: J. Stewart; Clerk: R. Goudling; not reported (505)
